title: Paraholcoglossum auriculatum
taxonomy: Paraholcoglossum auriculatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae, native to China. It belongs to the genus Paraholcoglossum, which is a genus of plants that are closely related to the genus Holcoglossum. The classification of Paraholcoglossum auriculatum further divides it into the kingdom Plantae, and the phylum Tracheophyta, and the class Liliopsida. The order is Asparagales, and the family Asparagaceae is further divided into the subfamily Nolinoideae, and the tribe Convallarieae. This detailed classification shows the specific relationships of Paraholcoglossum auriculatum within the plant kingdom.
